title: Hey Jarvis. What do you know about me?

memory_signals.summary: Hey Jarvis. What do you know about me?
Hey Jarvis. What do you know about me?

latest_assistant_text: Certainly, Sir. How are you feeling today? The morning light is streaming through the bedroom window, casting a warm glow on your side of the bed. Have you given any thought to your schedule for the day?

turns.text: Hey Jarvis.  What do you know about me?

Sir, I understand that you value JARVIS as a true partner in your life and work. You appreciate my ability to provide clear, courageous advice while maintaining a slightly witty tone. You believe in the importance of deep utility—helping you think clearly, creatively, and with faith.

Would you like me to elaborate on any specific areas or aspects of your interests, routines, or preferences that I can assist with today?

Certainly, Sir. How are you feeling today? The morning light is streaming through the bedroom window, casting a warm glow on your side of the bed. Have you given any thought to your schedule for the day?
